text: I find myself surrounded by stark modernity. The glass, the white walls, the neat strips of light, and the fire extinguisher all hint at a place that values order and innovation. It is sterile, yet anticipatory—something is about to happen, or perhaps already is happening, behind those closed doors. I feel an odd blend of curiosity and distance, as if I am on the threshold of discovery yet separated by a fragile membrane of glass and silence.
